name: Pollo En Salsa De Mani
recipeIngredient: 1 Sweet red pepper, cut into fine strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken breasts with salt and pepper. Fry them in oil for a few minutes on both sides until pale brown.
2. In a separate frying pan, fry the onion, sweet pepper, and garlic. Add the fresh tomatoes, tomato paste, coriander, and peanut butter.
3. Add the chicken to the sauce. Cover and let cook completely until tender, 30 minutes at low to medium heat. Stir occasionally.
4. Serve with Arroz con leche de coco.
